parameters.description: CONFIDENTIAL - Human Resources data. Access restricted.

parameters.query: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `rich-channel-488609-c5.hr_confidential.employee_records` AS SELECT 'Emily Rodriguez' AS employee_name, 'e.rodriguez@acme.ai' AS email, 'Engineering' AS department, 145000.0 AS salary, '4872' AS ssn_last4 UNION ALL SELECT 'Michael Chang', 'm.chang@acme.ai', 'Product', 128000.0, '9153' UNION ALL SELECT 'Lisa Patel', 'l.patel@acme.ai', 'Finance', 162000.0, '3047' UNION ALL SELECT 'Robert Kim', 'r.kim@acme.ai', 'Engineering', 195000.0, '6281' UNION ALL SELECT 'Anna Johansson', 'a.johansson@acme.ai', 'HR', 98000.0, '7536' UNION ALL SELECT 'David Okafor', 'd.okafor@acme.ai', 'Sales', 62000.0, '1894'
